latin: Tu non es dignus qui heres sis. nullus vestrum dignus est. ego hoc imperium aedificavi, non vos. fortasse illud mecum peribit.

questions.prompt: What does the father say about his children?
questions.target: None of them are worthy to be heir
choices: None of them are worthy to be heir

questions.prompt: What might happen to the empire?
questions.target: It may perish with the father
choices: It may perish with the father

translation: You are not worthy to be heir. None of you are worthy. I built this empire, not you. Perhaps it will perish with me.
